since_last: 59% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.52%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 59% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -0.15% · Gold -1.05% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 59% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.52%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.52%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +3.37%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +3.37%, ARM +3.15%, LSCC +3.04%, VRT +2.23%, MRVL +1.98%. Laggards: SAP -2.00%, NOW -1.08%, BABA -1.07%, PLTR -0.99%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.26% at $156.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.26% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
